office-hours.description: Brainstorm ideas with forcing questions and design thinking sessions

plan-ceo-review.description: CEO/founder-mode plan review — rethink scope, find the 10-star product

plan-eng-review.description: Eng manager review — lock architecture, data flow, edge cases, tests

plan-design-review.description: Designer's eye plan review — rate each dimension and fix to 10/10

review.description: Pre-landing PR review for SQL safety, trust boundaries, structural issues

ship.description: Ship: merge base, run tests, review diff, bump version, create PR, push

browse.description: Fast headless browser — navigate, interact, screenshot, verify state

qa.description: Systematically QA test a web app and iteratively fix bugs found

qa-only.description: Report-only QA — structured report with screenshots, no code changes

design-review.description: Visual QA — find spacing, hierarchy, inconsistency issues, then fix them

canary.description: Post-deploy canary monitoring — watch for errors and regressions

benchmark.description: Performance regression detection — baselines, Core Web Vitals, bundles

investigate.description: Systematic debugging with root cause investigation — no fix without cause

cso.description: Security audit — secrets, supply chain, CI/CD, OWASP, STRIDE modeling

connect-chrome.description: Launch real Chrome controlled by Claude with Side Panel activity feed

setup-browser-cookies.description: Import cookies from your real browser into headless browse sessions

design-consultation.description: Create a complete design system — typography, color, layout, motion

design-shotgun.description: Generate multiple AI design variants and collect structured feedback

design-html.description: Turn approved mockups into production-quality HTML/CSS with zero deps

codex.description: OpenAI Codex wrapper — code review, adversarial challenge, or consult

autoplan.description: Auto-review pipeline — run CEO, design, and eng reviews sequentially

document-release.description: Post-ship documentation update — sync README, ARCHITECTURE, CHANGELOG

land-and-deploy.description: Merge PR, wait for CI, deploy, verify production health via canary

setup-deploy.description: Configure deployment platform, URL, health checks for land-and-deploy

retro.description: Weekly engineering retrospective with commit analysis and trend tracking

agenda.description: Structured morning planning — overdue triage, inbox, and daily slate

jira.description: Manage Jira tickets — search, create, update, transition, log time

tmux.description: Tmux safety rules and patterns — prevents sending to wrong pane

claude-spawn.description: Spawn and orchestrate Claude Code agents across tmux panes

reminders.description: Manage Apple Reminders via remindctl — create, complete, reschedule

loop-prompt.description: Generate Ralph-style loop prompts for automated coding sessions

audit.description: Deep codebase audit — security, quality, architecture, error handling

sharpen-skill.description: Evaluate and improve skills via multi-agent research and critique

workflow.description: Sprint pipeline: Think → Plan → Build → Review → Ship

qa.description: Browser-based testing, visual QA, canary monitoring, and benchmarks

infrastructure.label: Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Debugging, security, and browser connectivity tools
